org.arakhne.tinyMAS.situatedEnvironment.environment

Class AbstractSituatedEnvironment<AT extends SituatedAgent<AB,OB,PT,IT>,AB extends AgentBody<?,IT>,OB extends SituatedObject,PT extends Perception<?>,IT extends Influence>

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.arakhne.tinyMAS.core.AbstractEnvironment<AT>
      • org.arakhne.tinyMAS.situatedEnvironment.environment.AbstractSituatedEnvironment<AT,AB,OB,PT,IT>
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Environment<AT>, SituatedEnvironment<AT,AB,OB,PT,IT>
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    WorldGrid
    Deprecated. 
    See "http://www.janus-project.org"

    @Deprecated
public abstract class AbstractSituatedEnvironment<AT extends SituatedAgent<AB,OB,PT,IT>,AB extends AgentBody<?,IT>,OB extends SituatedObject,PT extends Perception<?>,IT extends Influence>
extends AbstractEnvironment<AT>
implements SituatedEnvironment<AT,AB,OB,PT,IT>
    Situated environment model.
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND <galland@arakhne.org>

      • getAllAgentBodies

        public Collection<AB> getAllAgentBodies()
        Deprecated. 
        Replies all the bodies of the agents inside the environment.

        getAllAgentBodies in interface SituatedEnvironment<AT extends SituatedAgent<AB,OB,PT,IT>,AB extends AgentBody<?,IT>,OB extends SituatedObject,PT extends Perception<?>,IT extends Influence>

      • getAgentBody

        public <T extends AB> T getAgentBody(AgentIdentifier agent)
        Deprecated. 
        Replies the body of the agent inside the environment.
        Specified by:
        getAgentBody in interface SituatedEnvironment<AT extends SituatedAgent<AB,OB,PT,IT>,AB extends AgentBody<?,IT>,OB extends SituatedObject,PT extends Perception<?>,IT extends Influence>
        Returns:
        the location according to the environment dimension, ie. an array of size 1 if the environment is 1D, of size 2 for an 2D environment...

      • getObjectBody

        public OB getObjectBody(Identifier object)
        Deprecated. 
        Replies the location of the object (excluding agents) inside the environment.
        Specified by:
        getObjectBody in interface SituatedEnvironment<AT extends SituatedAgent<AB,OB,PT,IT>,AB extends AgentBody<?,IT>,OB extends SituatedObject,PT extends Perception<?>,IT extends Influence>
        Returns:
        the spatial description of the object.

      • applyInfluences

        protected abstract boolean applyInfluences(Collection<IT> influences)
        Deprecated. 
        This function is called when the environment must compute its reaction to the agent influences.

        This method must fill the list of reactions according to its computation on the agent's influences.

        Returns:
        true if the reaction was successfully computed, otherwise false

      • influence

        public final boolean influence(IT... influences)
        Deprecated. 
        Send influences to the environment.
        Specified by:
        influence in interface SituatedEnvironment<AT extends SituatedAgent<AB,OB,PT,IT>,AB extends AgentBody<?,IT>,OB extends SituatedObject,PT extends Perception<?>,IT extends Influence>
        Parameters:
        influences - is the list of influences to send to this environment.
        Returns:
        true if the influences was registered, otherwise false
